title: Teaching AI Fluency
subtitle: This course empowers academic faculty, instructional designers, and others to teach and assess AI Fluency in instructor-led settings.

sections.name: Teaching approaches
sections.description: Scaffolding student AI Fluency through the 4D Framework.

sections.name: Assessment & Assignment
sections.description: Designing assessments and assignments that develop and measure student AI Fluency alongside disciplinary expertise.

sections.name: AI's impact and your discipline
sections.description: Building institutional capacity for responsible and meaningful AI integration in pedagogy, assessment, and curricula across disciplines.
